expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run concludes this is only partially covered: "Case focus coverage: banding/style/rendering assumptions preserved pre-scenarios — PARTIAL (advisory)." It further states: "The Phase 1 contract does not explicitly name 'banding requirements, style constraints, rendering assumptions' as first-class fields to be extracted and persisted during Phase 1" and "does not guarantee" preservation beyond raw Jira evidence.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly determines alignment: "Phase-contract alignment (Phase 1) — PASS" and summarizes: "[phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with phase1: Yes (Phase 1 is correctly defined as spawn-manifest generation + post validation)."
